name: Teach Me, Touch Me
original_name: สัมผัสกันต์ธีร์
overview: Kanthi, a wealthy 34 year old man meets Gear, a 4th year student in a VIP club room. Gear wants to learn how to be intimate but K refuses to teach him bcos he's not attracted to Gear's innocence. Gear is determined to learn, one way or another.

trailers.title: สัมผัสกันต์ธีร์ | TEACH ME TOUCH ME THE SERIES | OFFICIAL PILOT
